top_signals.title: Asia-Pacific markets set to open mixed as concerns over Middle East conflict rise
top_signals.summary: Asia-Pacific markets were set to open mixed amid concerns over volatile oil prices with the Strait of Hormuz remaining closed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The US military wants to showcase battle-ready laser weapons by 2028
top_signals.summary: A directed energy demonstration is expected to occur during the summer of 2028, as part of a series of planned Golden Dome-related events.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
